hooks.name: block-entity-writes
hooks.description: Blocks Write/Edit to entity directories (03-query-batches, 04-findings, 05-sources, 06-claims) - forces create-entity.sh usage

hooks.name: validate-workspace-wikilinks
hooks.description: Validates wikilinks before entity creation: rejects bare filename wikilinks, requires workspace-relative paths

hooks.name: post-entity-creation
hooks.description: Validates entity structure after creation: YAML frontmatter, wikilink format, UUID uniqueness, entity type directory match

hooks.name: post-write-validate-wikilinks
hooks.description: Validates wikilinks in newly created entity files: detects broken links, trailing backslashes, .md extensions, and hallucinated references

hooks.name: pre-synthesis-validation
hooks.description: Validates research prerequisites before synthesis: claims availability (min 5), confidence scores, wikilink integrity

hooks.name: verify-source-creator-output
hooks.description: Anti-hallucination verification with AUTO-RECOVERY: validates source-creator output against filesystem reality

hooks.name: repair-missing-batches
hooks.description: Detect and repair missing batch files after findings-creator. Creates minimal batch entities from findings metadata.

hooks.name: verify-batch-creator-output
hooks.description: Anti-hallucination verification: validates batch-creator output against filesystem reality
